diagnostics.headline: deaths 2 vs your 5 norm — above your level

notes: Their main damage was Bayle (21k physical); 2/5 of you itemized armor.
Enemy ran 0/5 on or near their meta core — they were off-meta too, the win was there.
🎮 private (offlane) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 1-2 into a numbers advantage.
Willy Guggenheim (midlane) was alive but losing lane and pinned — with them stuck across the map, this was the wrong fight to start.
🎮 private (support) was dead — went down 33s earlier, so this was never a full-strength fight.
🎮 private (carry) was dead — went down 28s earlier, so this was never a full-strength fight.

threats: Chain-CC risk (2 hard-CC abilities, ~1.3s of lockdown): Countess Feast (suppress 0.75s), Bayle Kingslayer (knockback). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
Heal-stacking: The Fey. Anti-heal is mandatory against this comp — you brought none.
Dive threat on your backline: Countess. Assign peel for your carry and ward your flanks.
synergy: Little hard CC on your side — you can't force a pick. Play for poke/objectives and punish their cooldowns, don't flip coin-toss 5v5s.
You have sustain (Narbash) — favor the longer fight where your heals out-grind them.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Thunk stun → March! speed → Song heal aura → Crash Bang Boom! AoE slow ult
ourKits.winCondition: engage with Thunk and group-buff the team through fights
ourKits.playWith: a dive team that rides his speed and heal
ourKits.playAgainst: dodge/cleanse Thunk; he's low-damage — kill his carry through the aura

ourKits.combo: Energy Shield block → Displacement Blast → Assault Mode → GTFO lockon ult
ourKits.winCondition: out-trade with Pulsefire and the spell-shield, finish with GTFO
ourKits.playWith: peel so he can free-cast in Assault Mode
ourKits.playAgainst: bait Energy Shield, then commit; dodge GTFO's slow channel

ourKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
ourKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
ourKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
ourKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first

ourKits.combo: Ricochet stun → Bad Medicine zone → Infuse heal an ally → Neural Regenesis revive
ourKits.winCondition: keep an ally alive with Infuse + the revive ult and poke with Ricochet
ourKits.playWith: a carry she can pocket-heal and revive
ourKits.playAgainst: she can't heal herself — dive HER; bait the revive before committing

ourKits.combo: Ascend dive → Heaven's Fury multi-strike → Chastise slow → Heresy form ult, resets on takedowns
ourKits.winCondition: dive the backline and snowball Heresy resets
ourKits.playWith: a frontline that creates her dive angle
ourKits.playAgainst: peel the backline — deny the first kill and her resets dry up

enemyKits.combo: Shadow Slip in → Eventide → Blade Siphon → Feast suppress ult, Haemorrhage true-damage
enemyKits.winCondition: Feast-suppress a squishy and delete them with true-damage burst
enemyKits.passive: two-ability hits apply a %max-HP true-damage bleed
enemyKits.playWith: a team to clean up after her pick
enemyKits.playAgainst: Feast is her whole engage — bait it / peel; she's fragile, punish the recast window

enemyKits.combo: Bramble Patch slow → Harvest Nettles stacks → Untamed Growth DoT → Fly Trap pull ult
enemyKits.winCondition: Fly Trap a clumped team and detonate AoE on the pull
enemyKits.passive: takedowns spawn growths + grant move speed
enemyKits.playWith: engage that clumps for her Fly Trap
enemyKits.playAgainst: spread out vs the pull; she's squishy — dive her

enemyKits.combo: Skull Crusher gap-close → Dire Howl slow → Cursed Edge → Kingslayer knockback dash, Berserk at low HP
enemyKits.winCondition: engage, drop low into Berserk and out-brawl
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up while he commits the dive
enemyKits.playAgainst: his Berserk rewards low HP — burst him fully or disengage; anti-heal helps

enemyKits.combo: Reaping Dash → Hamstring slows → Safeguard spellshield → Earth Shatter execute
enemyKits.winCondition: trade with the spellshield up and execute low targets with Earth Shatter
enemyKits.passive: permanent power on unique hero takedowns
enemyKits.playWith: setup that holds a target for the execute
enemyKits.playAgainst: bait Safeguard's spellshield before committing your key CC
